attributes.description: Draws the card with a shadow. Can be used when the card has to stand out visually, for example in dashboards.
attributes.name: shadow

attributes.description: Draws the card with sharp edges. Can be used e.g. when nesting multiple syn-cards to create hierarchy.
attributes.name: sharp

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the card's main content.
cssParts.name: body

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the card's footer.
cssParts.name: footer

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the card's header.
cssParts.name: header

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the card's image.
cssParts.name: image

properties.description: Draws the card with a shadow. Can be used when the card has to stand out visually, for example in dashboards.
properties.name: shadow

properties.description: Draws the card with sharp edges. Can be used e.g. when nesting multiple syn-cards to create hierarchy.
properties.name: sharp

slots.description: An optional header for the card.
slots.name: header

slots.description: An optional footer for the card.
slots.name: footer

slots.description: An optional image to render at the start of the card.
slots.name: image

summary: Cards can be used to group related subjects in a container.
